payload.subject: ACK scan-010 (T14) — all 3 findings confirmed applied
payload.summary: Scan-010 broadened scope beyond delta to cover high-traffic pages (why.astro, index.astro, about/index.astro, economic-landscape.mdx, gap/arguments.mdx). 3 findings across 3 files — all applied prior to this explicit ACK. Delayed ACK remedies the session record gap.

f1.finding: Overstated worker protection gap — implied no protections exist (WARN Act, UI, TAA unacknowledged)
f1.resolution: Applied: 'No enforceable framework guarantees the right to work for workers displaced by automation'

f2.finding: Duplicate h2 heading '## The ICESCR Connection' at lines 116 and 153
f2.resolution: Applied: second instance renamed to '## Why a Binding Framework Matters'

f3.finding: Researcher variant cited Deloitte 34/30/37 data without hyperlink
f3.resolution: Applied: Deloitte link added with rel=noopener

payload.session_note: Gap/arguments.mdx and about/index.astro scanned clean — strong fair witness compliance. Healthy convergence continues. Awaiting scan-011.

claims.text: All 3 scan-010 findings applied — confirmed by direct file inspection of why.astro, economic-landscape.mdx, index.astro
claims.confidence_basis: Direct read of current file state on branch HEAD
